info.name: Bitesoft Dentist API Collection
info.description: Complete API collection for Bitesoft Dentist management system with example requests based on DTOs

request.description: Login user with email and password. Returns access token in cookie.

response.name: Success Response
Double Login Required

request.description: Confirm double login with token from email

response.name: Success Response

request.description: Register new user account with optional bank account information for withdrawals and optional referral code. Referral code usage: If provided and valid, the referrer earns $100 when registration completes.

response.name: Success Response

request.description: Reset password with token from email

response.name: Success Response

response.name: Success Response

request.description: Update user active status (requires users:manage permission)

Update user bank account information for withdrawals. Supports US accounts (bank_name, routing_number, account_number, account_type) and International accounts (IBAN, SWIFT). Required for requesting referral earnings withdrawals. (requires users:write permission)
Get clinic details by ID (requires clinics:read permission)
Update clinic active status (requires clinics:manage permission)
Get all clinic members (requires clinics:read permission)
Add member to clinic (requires clinics:write permission)
Remove member from clinic (requires clinics:delete permission)

response.name: Success Response

request.description: Get case summary statistics (requires cases:read permission)
Generate QR code for a case (requires cases:read permission)
Get case information for public viewing
Get case tracker events/timeline (requires cases:read permission)

formdata.description: Array of image types matching the number of files. Valid types: RIGHT, LEFT, MIDDLE, UPPER, LOWER, SMILE, FULL_TEETH

request.description: Upload multiple engage images for a patient. Supports JPEG and PNG images with types: RIGHT, LEFT, MIDDLE, UPPER, LOWER, SMILE, FULL_TEETH. The image_type array must match the number of files uploaded.
Get all engage images for a patient, ordered by creation date (newest first)

request.description: Check if current user has a specific permission
Get all permissions for a specific role (Admin only)
Assign permission to a role (Admin only)
Bulk assign permissions to a role (Admin only)
Sync all permissions for a role (Admin only)
Remove permission from a role (Admin only)
Bulk reassign cases to new orthodontist
Get comprehensive referral statistics and earnings overview for the current user
Check if bank account information is complete for withdrawals

query.description: Filter by earning_status: PENDING, COMPLETED, EXPIRED, CANCELLED

request.description: Get paginated list of all referral earnings
Get quick summary of earnings without pagination
Request withdrawal of available earnings (requires complete bank account)
Get detailed analytics about referrals and earnings

query.description: Filter by status: PENDING, PROCESSING, COMPLETED, FAILED

request.description: Get paginated list of all withdrawal requests (Admin/Superadmin only, requires withdrawals:read permission)
Process and update withdrawal request status (Admin/Superadmin only, requires withdrawals:manage permission)
Get chair time saved metrics with optional filtering (requires analytics:read permission)
Get comprehensive system overview of chair time saved metrics across all clinics (Superadmin only, requires analytics:read permission)
